description_long: This compact machine gun features a robust black metal frame with a cylindrical barrel and a prominent, curved box magazine. The receiver and upper assembly are constructed from dark metal, while the grip and lower handguard are made of wood with a rich brown finish, providing both ergonomic comfort and visual contrast. The front of the weapon is protected by a circular metal guard, and the top rail is flanked by simple iron sights for aiming. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The magazine is inserted at an angle, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower assembly. The weapon's compact size and sturdy construction suggest it is designed for portability and rapid deployment.
description: A compact, black metal machine gun with a curved box magazine and brown wooden grip, featuring simple iron sights and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel, circular front guard, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved box magazine, wooden grip, and the overall compact profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden grip, rear sight, and the symmetry of the upper assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger guard, and the metal receiver with wooden grip detail.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with protective front guard
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple notch rear sight with fixed front post
